# Backlog Item

- Backlog Item ID: `FR-001`
- Title: `Publish clear hero and services narrative`
- Persona/Actor: `Prospective client`
- Value statement: `For prospective clients, deliver a clear hero and services narrative to achieve quick trust and service comprehension.`
- Context: `Landing on the home page from search, referral, or direct links.`
- Problem statement: `Current structure does not guarantee a concise value proposition and service clarity above the fold.`
- Expected outcome: `Visitors understand who the brand serves, what is offered, and why to continue browsing.`
- Success metric(s): `>= 70% of users reach projects/contact sections from home in analytics observations after release.`
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - `Home page renders a hero section with headline, supporting copy, and primary CTA.`
  - `Services section lists core offerings with concise descriptions and stable card order.`
  - `Primary CTA navigates to contact section without broken anchors.`
- Non-goals: `Interactive quote workflow, pricing calculator, multi-language localization.`
- Constraints: `Static-first architecture, content sourced from repository-local data, no runtime secrets.`
- Dependencies: `FR-003 contact section, approved visual copy content.`
- Risks/assumptions: `Copy quality may delay completion; assumption that CTA target remains single contact section.`
- Validation approach: `E2E route smoke checks, section rendering checks, anchor navigation verification.`
- Priority score: `95`
- Target window: `Phase 1`
- Links:
  - Requirement entry: `requirements-log.md#FR-001`
  - ADR: `n/a`
  - ICR: `n/a`
  - PR/changeset: `n/a`
